New issue User Modeling / External Memory Service Integration (Honcho-style) #108 Open Labels capability enhancement source: hermes adtyavrdhnopened on Mar 26 Member Parent: #30 — Memory capability Goal Provide a capability for integrating external user modeling services that maintain structured user profiles, semantic search over interaction history, and dialectic Q&A — going beyond simple key-value memory to build a deep understanding of each user across sessions. Context Category: Capability ( AbstractCapability subclass) Serializability: Tier P — - UserModeling: {backend: honcho, base_url: "https://..."} (backend serializable; custom callbacks not) Capability interface methods: get_toolset() + get_instructions() + before_model_request() (via prefetch, see Speculative Prefetch for Capabilities (async background data loading) #107) Implementation status: Not started Blocked by: Memory capability #30 — Memory capability (base memory infrastructure) Description The problem
